checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 14 tests passed, MDE parse check passed, sample index check passed, fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: wrangler whoami

checks.evidence: Worker runtime OpenSearch secrets were uploaded through stdin without printing values.

checks.name: wrangler deploy

checks.name: public /api/cranfield/search

checks.name: public /api/cranfield/explain

evidence_quality: Strong public deployment evidence from Wrangler plus live public search and explain endpoint responses.
